---
title: "Formatage_Donnees_Brutes_Genotypages"
output: html_document
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# **ANALYSE PAR GLMM DES DONNEES DE RELEVES DE PIEGE A POIL**

## Import librairies

```{r}
#importation tidyverse

library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(forcats)
library(lubridate)

library(emmeans)
library(glmmTMB)
library(bbmle)

library(blme)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(MuMIn)

library(performance)
library(ggeffects)

library(ggsignif)

```

# Import du tableau

```{r}

Genotypages <- read_csv("Data/Genotypages.csv")

head(Genotypages)

```

# Tidyfication 

```{r}

Genotypages %>% 
  mutate(
    genotype = if_else(
      Geschlecht == "Lynx lynx",
      1,
      0
    )
  ) %>% 
  select(
    c(
      Nr,
      duree_exposition_jours,
      conditions_exposition,
      nombre_bulbes,
      genotype
      )
    ) %>% 
  replace_na(
    list(
      genotype = 0
    )
  ) %>% 
  write_csv("Data/Tidy_Genotypage.csv")

```
